title: Single Worker at Desk
protagonist_position: seated center at desk facing laptop
layout: One worker sits at an office desk with an open laptop, notebook, and coffee cup. A wall clock and small bookshelf sit behind the desk.
composition: Wide static office interior, desk centered, clear floor space, window on the right with simple blinds.
example_actions: The protagonist types on the laptop, pauses, and rubs the chin while thinking.
The protagonist notices the clock, slumps, and returns to the laptop with renewed urgency.
The protagonist closes the notebook, opens the phone, and scrolls with a guilty expression.

title: Desk Close-Up
protagonist_position: upper body visible behind desk, hands on desk
layout: Tighter framing on a desk surface with laptop, phone, checklist, and pen. One worker is visible from chest up behind the desk.
composition: Medium-wide shot focused on desk objects with the figure behind them, minimal background detail.
example_actions: The protagonist reaches for the phone, hesitates with fingers hovering, then pulls the hand back.
The protagonist checks items on the checklist and crosses one line with the pen.
The protagonist stares at the laptop screen with slumped shoulders and still hands.

title: Two Person Meeting
layout: Two stick figures sit across from each other at a meeting table with two chairs, laptop, whiteboard, window, and office plant.
composition: Wide static office meeting room, table centered, whiteboard on back wall, window on side wall.
example_actions: The left figure points toward the whiteboard while speaking. The right figure nods and opens the laptop.
The left figure leans forward with hands on the table. The right figure crosses arms and looks away.
Both figures shake hands briefly across the table, then sit back with relaxed posture.

title: Team Meeting Table
protagonist_position: head of long table, near whiteboard end
layout: A long meeting table with four chairs. Two foreground figures are clear; two background figures are faint at the far end.
composition: Wide conference room, long table receding into background, whiteboard visible behind head of table.
example_actions: The head-of-table figure gestures toward the whiteboard while the right-side figure takes notes.
The right-side figure raises one hand to speak while the head-of-table figure pauses and listens.
Both foreground figures turn toward the faint background figures as if inviting input.

title: Presentation Room
protagonist_position: standing left of screen near whiteboard
layout: One presenter stands beside a simple projection screen and whiteboard. One faint seated figure appears in the front row.
composition: Wide room with presenter on left, screen center, two rows of empty chairs, audience area open.
example_actions: The presenter points at the screen, then turns toward the seated figure with an open palm gesture.
The presenter shifts weight nervously, then straightens posture and continues pointing at the screen.
The presenter places the remote on the table and uses both hands to emphasize a point.

title: Office Reception
layout: A reception counter with a seated waiting chair, office plant, wall clock, and entry door behind the counter.
composition: Front-facing reception area, counter across lower frame, door and clock on back wall.
example_actions: The protagonist checks the wall clock, taps the counter, and shifts weight from foot to foot.
The protagonist picks up the phone, listens briefly, and places it down with a polite nod.
The protagonist opens the visitor book, hesitates, and looks toward the entry door.

title: Open Plan Office
secondary_position: right desk turned slightly toward protagonist
layout: Two parallel desks with laptops and dividers. Each desk has one seated worker facing their screen.
composition: Wide open office floor, two desks in foreground, simple filing cabinet and plant in back.
example_actions: The left figure works on the laptop while the right figure turns and watches with curious posture.
The right figure stretches and smiles while the left figure slumps and stares at the screen.
Both figures reach for their phones at the same time, then glance at each other awkwardly.

title: Office Hallway
layout: A simple office hallway with doors on both sides, a water cooler, wall clock, and notice board.
composition: One-point perspective hallway, figure mid-frame, doors symmetrically placed, no depth clutter.
example_actions: The protagonist walks slowly toward the far door, slows down, and stops before reaching it.
The protagonist checks the wall clock, turns around, and takes one step back.
The protagonist stands at the water cooler, fills a cup, and stares at the notice board.

title: Living Room
layout: A living room with couch, side table, lamp, window, and low shelf with a few books.
composition: Wide static living room, couch left of center, window right, open floor space.
example_actions: The protagonist picks up the remote, presses it, then slumps deeper into the couch.
The protagonist reaches toward the side table for the phone and begins scrolling.
The protagonist sits upright with improved posture and places the remote down deliberately.

title: Kitchen
layout: A kitchen counter with cup, kettle, simple cabinets, fridge outline, and one stool.
composition: Wide kitchen view, counter across middle, fridge on one side, upper cabinets minimal.
example_actions: The protagonist opens the fridge, stares inside, and closes it without taking anything.
The protagonist pours from the kettle into the cup and wraps both hands around it.
The protagonist reaches into the fruit bowl, hesitates, and chooses a snack with a shrug.

title: Bedroom
protagonist_position: lying in bed with head on pillow
layout: A bedroom with bed, bedside table, alarm clock, lamp, and simple wardrobe outline.
composition: Wide bedroom, bed centered, bedside table right, wardrobe left wall, window behind bed.
example_actions: The protagonist reaches to silence the alarm clock and pulls the blanket over the head.
The protagonist sits up slowly, rubs eyes, and stares at the alarm clock.
The protagonist picks up the phone from the bedside table and scrolls while lying back.

title: Dining Room
layout: A dining table with two chairs, two place settings, simple window, and sideboard.
composition: Wide dining room, table centered, window behind table, sideboard along wall.
example_actions: The left figure speaks with a small hand gesture while the right figure listens with neutral posture.
The right figure pushes the plate away slightly while the left figure leans forward concerned.
Both figures eat in silence with eyes down, then the left figure attempts a small smile.

title: Home Office Nook
protagonist_position: seated at small desk facing laptop
layout: A corner home office with small desk, laptop, bookshelf, desk lamp, and houseplant.
composition: Compact room corner, desk against two walls, bookshelf above, clear chair space.
example_actions: The protagonist types, pauses, and looks at the notebook with a tired expression.
The protagonist turns on the desk lamp and continues working with straighter posture.
The protagonist closes the laptop, exhales, and leans back in the chair.

title: Street Crosswalk
layout: A simple street crosswalk with road lines, walk signal box, and sidewalk. One figure waits at the curb.
composition: Wide street scene simplified, crosswalk in foreground, minimal building outlines far back.
example_actions: The protagonist steps forward as if to cross, hesitates, and steps back to the curb.
The protagonist checks an imaginary watch posture and shifts the bag impatiently.
The protagonist crosses with confident stride and exits frame right.

title: Bus Stop
layout: A bus stop bench, route sign, simple shelter post, and road line. One seated figure with a bag.
composition: Wide roadside view, bench left, sign above, open road right.
example_actions: The protagonist checks the route sign, slumps on the bench, and taps feet impatiently.
The protagonist pulls out a phone and scrolls while waiting.
The protagonist stands up quickly as if seeing the bus, then sits back down disappointed.

title: Coffee Shop Two People
layout: A small cafe table with two chairs, two cups, and a simple counter in the background.
composition: Wide cafe interior, table centered, counter back wall, window side light.
example_actions: The left figure speaks with open hands while the right figure nods and lifts a cup.
The right figure looks down into the cup while the left figure waits with folded arms.
Both figures laugh with small upper-body movement, then settle back into neutral posture.

title: Park Bench
layout: A park bench on a simple path with two tree outlines and a trash bin.
composition: Wide park scene, bench center, path behind, trees framing sides, open sky area.
example_actions: The protagonist sits still, then slowly straightens posture and looks upward.
The protagonist opens a book, reads briefly, and closes it with a sigh.
The protagonist checks a phone, frowns, and places it face down on the bench.

title: Supermarket Aisle
layout: A supermarket aisle with shelf lines, shopping cart, and a few simple product blocks.
composition: One-point aisle perspective, figure with cart center, shelves both sides, ceiling lights simple.
example_actions: The protagonist reaches for a shelf item, hesitates, and puts it in the cart quickly.
The protagonist compares two shelf items by holding one in each hand.
The protagonist pushes the cart forward slowly while looking down with regret posture.

title: Supermarket Checkout
layout: A checkout counter with conveyor belt, card reader, and one faint cashier figure behind counter.
composition: Wide checkout lane, conveyor foreground, counter mid-frame, queue barrier simple.
example_actions: The protagonist places items on the conveyor and opens a wallet with hesitant motion.
The protagonist taps the card reader, smiles briefly, then slumps as if seeing the total.
The protagonist removes one item from the basket and places it aside.

title: Elevator
layout: Inside a simple elevator with button panel, mirror line, and floor indicator.
composition: Tight elevator interior, figure center, doors front, panel right side.
example_actions: The protagonist presses a button, watches the floor indicator, and shifts weight nervously.
The protagonist checks reflection posture in the mirror line and straightens shoulders.
The protagonist exhales with relief as doors appear to open forward.

title: Classroom
layout: A teacher figure at the front board with two faint student figures seated at desks.
composition: Wide classroom, board back wall, three desk rows, teacher foreground left of board.
example_actions: The teacher points at the board, then turns toward the students with an open palm.
The teacher writes one simple diagram line, pauses, and taps the board twice.
The teacher folds arms, listens posture, then nods and returns to the board.

title: Study Desk
layout: A quiet study desk with stacked books, desk lamp, notebook, and cup in a library corner.
composition: Medium-wide study nook, bookshelf behind, desk lamp lit, figure hunched over notebook.
example_actions: The protagonist writes in the notebook, stops, and presses pen to lips while thinking.
The protagonist flips through stacked books and slumps with overwhelmed posture.
The protagonist closes all books, sits upright, and opens one book with deliberate focus.

title: Hospital Waiting Room
layout: A waiting room with row of chairs, reception window, wall clock, and magazine table.
composition: Wide waiting room, chairs along wall, reception window back left, clock above.
example_actions: The protagonist checks the wall clock repeatedly and taps the chair armrest.
The protagonist picks up a magazine, flips one page, and puts it down unread.
The protagonist stands when called, hesitates, and sits back down with nervous posture.

title: Consultation Room
secondary_position: seated right behind desk as clinician
layout: A consultation desk with two chairs, simple chart board, and examination bed outline in back.
composition: Wide clinical room, desk between figures, chart board wall, bed along side wall.
example_actions: The patient leans forward with worried posture while the clinician gestures calmly to the chart board.
The clinician slides the clipboard forward and the patient nods slowly with tense shoulders.
The patient exhales, shoulders drop, and the clinician gives a small reassuring nod.

title: Gym Weights Area
layout: A gym corner with weight bench, dumbbells, mirror line, and wall clock.
composition: Wide gym area, bench center, mirror on wall, dumbbell rack side, open floor.
example_actions: The protagonist lifts dumbbells with effort, then lowers them and bends forward tired.
The protagonist sits on the bench, looks at the clock, and stands up with renewed effort.
The protagonist wipes face with towel, drops shoulders, and walks away from the bench.

title: Gym Cardio Area
layout: A treadmill with simple control panel, wall clock, and water bottle on nearby shelf.
composition: Wide cardio zone, treadmill centered, mirror line side wall, minimal equipment.
example_actions: The protagonist jogs with steady rhythm, then slows the panel setting and exhales.
The protagonist starts hesitant, increases pace, and straightens posture gradually.
The protagonist stops treadmill, grabs water bottle, and leans on the rail catching breath.

title: Train Seat
protagonist_position: seated by window seat left side
layout: A train interior with window seat, overhead rail, bag on lap, and simple aisle.
composition: Wide train carriage slice, window left with passing lines, seat and figure center.
example_actions: The protagonist watches the window lines pass, then looks down at the phone and scrolls.
The protagonist closes eyes and leans head against the window with tired posture.
The protagonist checks a phone notification and sits upright with alert posture.

title: Standing Commute
layout: A transit interior with overhead strap, poles, door outline, and floor lines.
composition: Wide transit car, figure standing center, doors back, poles spaced evenly.
example_actions: The protagonist sways slightly with vehicle motion while gripping the strap.
The protagonist reaches for phone one-handed and loses balance slightly before recovering.
The protagonist shifts bag, straightens posture, and prepares to step toward the doors.

title: Retail Counter
layout: A retail counter with product display, card reader, and faint clerk figure behind counter.
composition: Wide shop counter view, products left, payment area center, clerk background right.
example_actions: The protagonist points at a product, hesitates, and places it back on the display.
The protagonist taps the card reader and smiles briefly, then frowns at the bag.
The protagonist opens wallet, counts invisible bills posture, and puts one item aside.

title: Outdoor Cafe Solo
layout: An outdoor cafe table with chair, cup, simple umbrella line, and sidewalk behind.
composition: Wide outdoor seating, table center, umbrella pole, sidewalk and building line back.
example_actions: The protagonist lifts the cup, sips, and gazes forward with reflective posture.
The protagonist pulls out a phone, scrolls, and sets the cup down forgotten.
The protagonist closes phone, sits upright, and writes one note in a small notebook.
